summary: Completed testing of Pre-Transfer Review (BAC-F6-17) feature. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All flows working - page loads correctly with stats cards, data table, Create/View/Edit/Decision modals, and PDF download.
critical_code_review_comments: Pre-Transfer Review CRUD operations all working correctly
Default checklist initialized with 8 compliance items (suspension_status, threat_of_suspension, etc.)
Make-decision endpoint validates decision type (approved/rejected only)
PDF generator creates bilingual (English/Arabic) PDFs with all review data
Notifications created on create and decision events
seed_data_creation: Existing record: 'Test Company ABC' (draft) - CERT-001-2025 - from Previous CB Ltd
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-Transfer Review (BAC-F6-17) feature fully tested. Key workflow: Admin creates transfer review for clients moving from another CB -> Fills compliance checklist -> Makes approval/rejection decision -> Downloads PDF. UI in RTL Arabic mode by default. Existing test data: 'Test Company ABC' with draft status.

endpoints_verified.GET /api/pre-transfer-reviews: WORKING - Lists all reviews with optional status filter
endpoints_verified.POST /api/pre-transfer-reviews: WORKING - Creates review with client_name (required) and default checklist
endpoints_verified.PUT /api/pre-transfer-reviews/{id}: WORKING - Updates review fields including checklist
endpoints_verified.DELETE /api/pre-transfer-reviews/{id}: WORKING - Deletes review, returns 404 if not found
endpoints_verified.POST /api/pre-transfer-reviews/{id}/make: WORKING - Sets transfer_decision (approved/rejected), updates status to 'decision_made'
endpoints_verified.GET /api/pre-transfer-reviews/{id}/pdf: WORKING - Generates bilingual PDF with all review data

frontend_verified.Page Load: WORKING - Stats cards (Total, Draft, Pending, Approved, Rejected), data table, action buttons
frontend_verified.Create Modal: WORKING - Client info (name EN/AR, address, phone, enquiry ref), Transfer details (reason, existing CB, cert no, validity, scope, sites, EAC code), Standards checkboxes (ISO 9001/14001/45001/22000/27001)
frontend_verified.View Modal: WORKING - Shows client info, status, certificate number, compliance checklist (8 items)
frontend_verified.Edit Modal: WORKING - Updates client info, checklist Yes/No/N/A dropdowns, attachments checkboxes, certification cycle stage
frontend_verified.Decision Modal: WORKING - Radio buttons for Approve/Reject, rejection reason field, reviewer/approver fields, confirm button

checklist_items_tested: within_bac_scope - Activities within BAC accreditation scope?

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
